items.description:
Complete the treasure hunt in the Skechers store in Livetopia Mall to win these shoes! 

Blaze through the day with fiery fun in Skechers:Thermo-Flash- Heat-Flux. This design features a mesh and synthetic upper with flame detail, a hook-and-loop instep strap, flat lace front, and a 'fiery' themed midsole.
